summary: Completed frontend testing of Orders page filters/search, OrderForm buttons (View Invoice, Save & Invoice), Employees page, and Invoice page. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Orders page: Search input found with data-testid='search-orders'
Orders page: Status filter dropdown found with data-testid='status-filter'
Orders page: Sort dropdown found with options (Order ID, Newest, Delivery Date, Amount)
Orders page: Date range inputs found (2 date inputs)
Orders page: Result count displayed correctly (e.g., '14 of 14 orders')
Orders page: Search filter working - searching 'KSH-01' returns 1 order
Orders page: Status filter working - filtering 'pending' returns 6 orders
Orders page: Sort 'newest' applied successfully
Orders page: Sort 'amount' applied successfully
Orders page: Sort 'delivery' applied successfully
Orders page: Date range filter working - filtering from '2025-01-01' returns 14 orders
Orders page: Date filter clear button working
OrderForm (edit mode KSH-01): Invoice button in header found
OrderForm (edit mode KSH-01): View Invoice button in billing summary found
OrderForm (new order): Save & Invoice button found
OrderForm (new order): Save Order button found
OrderForm (new order): Invoice button correctly hidden in new order mode
OrderForm: Save & Invoice creates order and redirects to invoice page (tested with KSH-15)
Employees page: Loaded without errors (no Shadcn Select import issues)
Employees page: Add Employee button found
Invoice page (KSH-01): Loaded successfully
Invoice page: Shows business name 'Kshana Contour'
Invoice page: Shows order ID correctly
Invoice page: Shows customer name correctly
Invoice page: Print Invoice button found
seed_data_creation: Created test order KSH-15 for 'Test Customer Invoice' during Save & Invoice functionality test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Orders page filters - search, status, sort (Order ID/Newest/Delivery Date/Amount), date range all working correctly with result count display. 2) OrderForm edit mode has 'Invoice' button in header and 'View Invoice' button in billing summary section. 3) OrderForm new order mode has 'Save & Invoice' button that creates order and redirects to invoice page. 4) Employees page loads without Shadcn Select import errors. 5) Invoice page renders correctly with all billing details. Test order KSH-15 was created during testing.
